narrative:
Pymatuning Valley Local Sd (Ashtabula) school district has 5,312 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
